v01.description: in Should Conduct HIV test 2, the conjunction between the first and second conjuncts is effectively changed from AND to OR

v02.description: in Should Conduct HIV test 2, 'Population prevalence ... >= 5%' is combined with other conditions using 'or' where 'and' is required

v03.description: in Should Conduct HIV test 2, the 'HIV status in HIV negative choices' precondition is missing

v04.description: in Should Conduct HIV test, the 'ANC contact number = 1' precondition is missing

v05.description: in Should HIV test is optional, the threshold comparator is changed from '< 5 %' to '<= 5 %'

v06.description: in Should Conduct HIV test, 'ANC contact number = 1' is changed to 'ANC contact number != 1'

v07.description: in Should Conduct HIV test, the '>= 5 %' condition is changed to '> 5 %'

v08.define: Should HIV test is not required
v08.description: in Should HIV test is not required, the HIV status value set used is 'HIV negative choices' instead of 'HIV positive choices'

v09.description: in Should Conduct HIV test 2, the HIV status value set is changed from 'HIV negative choices' to 'HIV positive choices'

v10.description: in Should Conduct HIV test, the HIV prevalence threshold is changed from '>= 5 %' to '>= 6 %'

v11.description: in Should HIV test is optional, the HIV prevalence cutoff is changed from '< 5 %' to '< 6 %'

v12.description: in Should Conduct HIV test 2, the HIV prevalence threshold is changed from '>= 5 %' to '>= 6 %'
